testcase.name: avr-instance-manager › ensureZoneInstances creates zone instances when physical connection present
avr-instance-manager › ensureZoneInstances skips when no physical connection present
avr-instance-manager › ensureZoneInstances refreshes config of existing instance
listening-mode › ConfigManager validates and normalizes listeningModeOptions (semicolon string)
connect-coordinator › connect returns false when no avrs configured
connect-coordinator › connect creates physical connections and zone instances when missing
connect-coordinator › connect handles reconnection when physical connection exists but disconnected
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser handles truncated and valid NLA frames
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser parses malformed and valid NTM payloads
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser metadata flows keep raw values and support patch/get
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser maps unknown commands to null and zone commands correctly
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser handles NLS validation and NLA extraction
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser emits NLT_CONTEXT for My Presets on NET source
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser updates browse state from NLT headers per active subsource
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser FLD routing suppresses NET scrolling and handles FM/default
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser maps TuneIn NAT title to canonical service name
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser parses IFA payload into normalized audio fields
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser parses IFV payload and handles unknown resolution display
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser merges multi-frame metadata payloads
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser emits NLT when service text indicates subsource switch
connection-manager › schedule and cancel scheduled reconnection
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser decodes generic hex payloads for mapped commands without int range
eiscp-command-parser › IscpCommandParser FLD sanitizes characters and skips service text outside NET
connection-manager › attemptReconnection delegates to reconnection manager and returns result
connection-manager › clearAllConnections removes stored connections
eiscp-multi-zone › buildMultiZoneVolumeCommands filters and maps zone-specific up/down commands
eiscp-multi-zone › buildMultiZoneMuteCommands generates zone-specific mute/unmute sequences
eiscp-multi-zone › Multi-zone command generation is deterministic and repeatable
eiscp-multi-zone › Multi-zone command generation ignores unknown directions and zones
eiscp-packet › extracts concatenated ISCP frames individually
eiscp-packet › createEiscpPacket adds !1 prefix and valid ISCP header
eiscp-packet › extractAllIscpMessages falls back to single-frame extraction for malformed input
menu-browse-state › resetMenuBrowseState clears both data and runtime transient flags
menu-browse-state › Transient flags reset prevents state leaks across service switches
menu-browse-state › consumeListModeActive toggles transient flag correctly before reset
command-sender › CommandSender rejects malformed entity ids and unknown AVR targets
command-sender › CommandSender executes core command branches and zone-specific routing
command-sender › CommandSender handles relative volume ignore and throttle
command-sender › CommandSender handles known simple commands via handleSimpleCommand fallthrough
avr-state-playback-status › AvrStateManager maps NET playbackStatus paused to MediaPlayerStates.Paused
command-receiver-listening-mode › CommandReceiver preserves user-configured listeningModeOptions across IFA/source events
entity-registrar-config › EntityRegistrar returns user-configured listeningModeOptions from config
config-coercions › createAvrSpecificConfig coerces types correctly
config-coercions › CommandSender volume conversion respects adjustVolumeDispl
entity-registrar › EntityRegistrar builds entities correctly
entity-registrar › EntityRegistrar sensor names omit host from display name
entity-registrar › EntityRegistrar long entity names include host when configured
onkyo-reconfigure › registerAvailableEntities refreshes listening_mode options on reconfigure
setup-backup › backup flow returns backup_data JSON
setup-backup › restore flow applies provided backup_data
setup-backup › restore flow defaults missing TuneIn menu setting to mypresets
setup-backup › restore flow accepts intg-manager restore_from_backup payload
setup-backup › initial setup manual mode opens configuration form
media-browser › Media player browse returns TuneIn presets only for NET TuneIn
media-browser › Media player browse ignores TuneIn menu entries until My Presets is active
media-browser › TuneIn browse root exposes all presets when the list is longer than 10
media-browser › Media player browse returns TuneIn full menu items from NET TuneIn
media-browser › Media player browse hides TuneIn Login menu item
media-browser › TuneIn selection keeps subsource and state so browse can be repeated
media-browser › TuneIn preset cache survives post-select menu updates
media-browser › Media player browse returns Tidal menu entries from AVR NLS updates
media-browser › Media player browse returns Deezer menu entries from AVR NLS updates
media-browser › Media player browse marks Deezer NLS entries without %s as playable tracks
media-browser › Media player browse hides excluded Tidal menu items
media-browser › Media player browse defaults to 25 items per page when paging is omitted
media-browser › Tidal browse survives DAB-to-NET transition when NLT/NLS arrive early
media-browser › Repeated NLT tidal updates do not clear existing Tidal menu options

simple-commands › SIMPLE_COMMANDS_MAP contains expected known input keys

simple-commands › SIMPLE_COMMANDS_MAP replaces hyphens with underscores in IDs
simple-commands › ALL_SIMPLE_COMMANDS is an array of all map keys
setup-handler › handleRestorePayload: applies valid payload and calls onConfigSaved
setup-handler › handleRestorePayload: invalid payload returns RequestUserInput with preserved textarea
setup-handler › handleDeleteConfigPayload: confirm=false prompts and confirm=true clears config
setup-handler › handleManualConfiguration: valid input creates AVR entries
setup-handler › handleManualConfiguration: invalid input returns RequestUserInput with errors
setup-handler › handleBackupPayload: returns backup data JSON textarea
setup-handler › handleManualConfiguration: autodiscovery should persist listeningModeOptions when supplied
